title: Grit Swooper Run Manifest Generator Boundary
forbids: Swooper Run in Game generation drifting from one manifest input and request-local generated-mod output
why: Packet 8 makes request generation manifest-only: the command accepts one manifest path, the port reads the shared private manifest contract, derives generated-mod from that manifest, and delegates file-plan application to @civ7/plugin-files.
remediate: Keep generate-run-manifest.ts as the single-argument CLI shim and run-manifest-generator.ts as the manifest-path port that calls buildSwooperRunGeneratedModFilePlan and applyGeneratedFilePlan(plan, { outputRoot: generatedModRoot }).
message: Swooper Run in Game manifest generator boundary drifted.
